actors.name: Péter Magyar
actors.blurb: Magyar has dominated coverage by aggressively dismantling the legacy of his predecessor, Viktor Orbán. His actions include opening government buildings to the public, terminating high-value contracts with figures linked to Orbán, and publicly clashing with former officials. His rhetoric and symbolic gestures, such as refusing to pay Orbán's severance, have fueled intense media scrutiny and debate about Hungary's political future.

actors.name: Giorgia Meloni
actors.blurb: Meloni remains a central figure in European right-wing politics, with her policies on migration, energy, and EU relations driving significant coverage. Her recent push for EU recognition of Italy's migrant processing model in Albania and her advocacy for nuclear energy have sparked debates. Meloni's international engagements, including her visit to Greece and Cyprus, further highlight her influence in shaping Europe's right-wing agenda.

actors.name: Donald Trump
actors.role: Former President of the United States, Presidential Candidate
actors.blurb: Trump continues to dominate global right-wing discourse, particularly following his recent visit to China and his administration's policies. His discussions with Xi Jinping on trade, Taiwan, and Iran have generated significant coverage, as have his domestic policies, including the administration's stance on immigration, abortion, and veterans' rights. Trump's influence remains a defining force in U.S. and international politics.

actors.name: Javier Milei
actors.blurb: Milei's presidency continues to generate significant coverage due to his radical economic policies and political controversies. His government's handling of inflation, privatization efforts, and judicial investigations into his officials, including Chief of Staff Manuel Adorni, have kept him in the spotlight. Milei's international engagements, such as his humanitarian aid to Bolivia and his alignment with the U.S. and Israel, further amplify his prominence in global news cycles.

actors.name: Jordan Bardella
actors.blurb: Bardella's rising influence in French politics has been underscored by his public relationship with Princess Maria-Carolina de Bourbon and his strategic positioning ahead of the 2027 presidential election. His criticism of high-profile figures like Kylian Mbappé and his stance on immigration and national identity have fueled media debates about the future of France's far-right movement.
